ResponseType

StartTimestamp

InternetTrackingSummaryCMA Created Count
CmaCreatedCount
The sum of Competitive Market Analysis (CMA) reports created.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryCMA Emailed Count
CmaEmailedCount
The sum of Competitive Market Analysis (CMA) reports emailed.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryCMA Ran Count
CmaRanCount
The sum of Competitive Market Analysis (CMA) reports ran.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryCMA Shared Count
CmaSharedCount
The sum of Competitive Market Analysis (CMA) reports shared (on social media, SMS, etc.).Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryInquiry Count
InquiryCount
The sum of end-user inquiry events; also referred to as leads. The end-user submitted an inquiry for more information...Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryImpression Count
ImpressionCount
The aggregated sum of impressions that the object obtained during the summary time period.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryMobile App Impression Count
MobileAppImpressionCount
The sum of impressions derived from a mobile app, not a browser.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryListings Emailed Count
ListingsEmailedCount
The sum of emails the listing was involved in.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryFavorited Count
FavoritedCount
The sum of favorited events (liked, starred, add-to-list, etc.) the listing obtained.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryShared Count
SharedCount
The sum of shares (social media, SMS, etc.) the listing was part of.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryView Count
ViewCount
The sum of detailed views the listing obtained.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryMobile App View Count
MobileAppViewCount
The sum of views derived from a mobile app, not a browser.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryTotal Logins
TotalLogins
The sum of logins on the product.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryShowing Completed Count
ShowingCompletedCount
The sum of showings completed.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryShowing Requested Count
ShowingRequestedCount
The sum of showings requested.Number—
InternetTrackingSummaryTracking Date
TrackingDate
The actual date the summary data pertains to.Date—

TrackingType
Defines the type of tracking data being sought (e.g., Office, Agent), a single listing itself or the entire data set...String List, Single—
InternetTrackingSummaryTracking Values
TrackingValues
The comma-delimited values that relate to the TrackingType field in the search.String—
InternetTrackingSummaryUnique Logins
UniqueLogins
The sum of logins on the product that are unique.Number—
